assertions.assertion: Server-side code contains '.AddBffBlazorClient()' in the service configuration
assertions.rationale: Server-side code chains `.AddBffBlazorClient()` on the BFF builder.

assertions.assertion: Client-side code contains 'AddBffBlazorClient' with polling interval set to 30 seconds (TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30))
assertions.rationale: Client-side code calls `AddBffBlazorClient(options => { options.Polling = new BffBlazorClientPollingOptions { Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30) }; })`.
